day2_after_start.text: *The last class ends and Eunsu approaches.*

day2_after_eunsu_1.name: Eunsu
day2_after_eunsu_1.text: "Our school has a pretty good smart campus system. Campus Wi-Fi, library access, cafeteria — all through one app."

day2_after_eunsu_2.name: Eunsu
day2_after_eunsu_2.text: "As a transfer student, you probably aren't registered for the 'Student Safety App' yet. You can't even use the cafeteria without it."

day2_after_eunsu_3.text: *I search the app store. 'Hanul Smart Campus'. 4.8 stars. High rating.*

day2_after_eunsu_6.text: *The teacher hands me a sticky note. Neat handwriting.*

day2_after_eunsu_7.text:
*I launch the app and permission requests pop up.*

[Location Permission] — 'Required for locating students during campus emergencies'
[Camera Permission] — 'Required for student ID QR scan'
[Microphone Permission] — 'Required for emergency calls'

choices: Change location to 'Only while using app'

day2_after_limit_1.text: *App notification: 'Location permission is restricted. Emergency safety features will be disabled.'*

day2_after_limit_2.name: Eunsu
day2_after_limit_2.text: "It's better to set location to 'Always Allow.' If {name} collapses or something, we can find you right away."

day2_after_limit_4.name: Eunsu
day2_after_limit_4.text: "A student collapsed during sports last year. The policy was strengthened after that."

day2_after_limit_5.text: *A student who collapsed last year... so that happened. It's for safety, after all.*

day2_after_sea_1.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea_1.text: "You came? Thanks for coming again today."

day2_after_sea_4.text: *Sea smiles. That smile... looks like relief.*

day2_after_sea_5.text: *Stacks of documents on the student council room desk. Sports day paperwork.*

day2_after_sea_6.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea_6.text: "Sports day is next week. I need to organize the event programs and class applications."

day2_after_sea_8.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea_8.text: "Really? Can you sort the applications by date?"

day2_after_sea_9.text: *Sea works on the event programs while I sort applications. Simple work, but it's not boring with someone beside you.*

day2_after_sea_10.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea_10.text: "Look, Class 2 signed up for both tug-of-war and relay. Ambitious."

day2_after_sea_12.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea_12.text: "Our class... hasn't submitted yet. I'm the class president and this is happening?"

day2_after_sea_15.text:
*Sea drops the application form on the desk with a thud.*

*After working for a while, Sea plays music. The same band from lunch.*

day2_after_sea_17.text: *The sound of papers and music. Sunset light streams through the window. This moment... feels nice.*

day2_after_sea_18.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea_18.text: "...{name}. Before you came, I was always alone here."

day2_after_sea_19.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea_19.text: "Everyone draws a line because I'm the class president. They smile, but... keep their distance."

day2_after_sea_20.text: *Sea looks out the window. The sunset paints her face. The hand holding the documents has gone still.*

day2_after_sea_22.text: *The corners of Sea's eyes have turned slightly red.*

day2_after_sea_23.name: Me
day2_after_sea_23.text: "...Thank you for being honest with me."

day2_after_sea_24.name: Han Sea
day2_after_sea_24.text: "...So don't change. You have to keep being close with me."

day2_after_sea_26.text: *Sea looks at me. She seems about to say something, but closes her mouth. Then picks up the documents again.*

day2_after_sea_28.text: *After that, we worked in silence. Only the music played. It was a comfortable silence.*

day2_after_hallway_1.text: *Leaving the student council room, I walk down the hallway and find some classmates gathered by the vending machine.*

day2_after_hallway_3.name: Me
day2_after_hallway_3.text: "I was helping Sea in the student council room."

day2_after_hallway_4.name: Girl student
day2_after_hallway_4.text: "Helping Sea? Already? You've only been here two days."

day2_after_hallway_5.name: Boy student
day2_after_hallway_5.text: "Once the class president starts being nice to you, there's no escape."

day2_after_hallway_7.name: Girl student
day2_after_hallway_7.text: "Hey, want something from the vending machine? I'll buy you one."

day2_after_hallway_9.name: Boy student
day2_after_hallway_9.text: "Come on, we should at least do this much for the new kid. A welcome gesture."

day2_after_hallway_10.text:
*I received a can of coffee milk. Cold.*

*We chatted for a bit. Restaurants near school, what to name our class for sports day, how the homeroom teacher grades fast...*

day2_after_hallway_11.text: *Natural conversation. The people at this school... are all really nice.*

day2_after_seolhwa_1.text:
*I'm about to walk out the school gate when I feel a gaze from behind.*

*I stop and turn around.*

day2_after_seolhwa_2.text: *It's Seolhwa. Standing inside the gate, watching me. In the sunset light. Her long hair drifts in the wind over her uniform.*

day2_after_seolhwa_3.text: *...This time she doesn't disappear. She stands there, watching me. Her eyes are wet.*

day2_after_seolhwa_4.text: *Her lips are moving. She seems to be saying something, but I can't hear. Too far away? No, the distance doesn't seem that far.*

day2_after_seolhwa_5.text: *...Why is she crying? I take a step toward her.*

day2_after_seolhwa_6.text: *A group of students passes by. My view is blocked. One second. When I look again, Seolhwa is already walking away.*

day2_after_seolhwa_7.text: *Her retreating figure disappears into the schoolyard. Slipping between students, but no one says hello.*

day2_after_seolhwa_8.text:
*...That girl. In class too. Does she not have any friends? Or is she the type who prefers being alone?*

*...It bothers me. Tomorrow I'll definitely try talking to her.*
